$comment: RubyMIK update manifest served at https://rubymik.com/version.json. Updated by scripts/release.sh on each release. P38 contract.
notes: 1.1.9 — patch: fixes "Router Admin" (WebFig) showing 'connection refused' on public / tunnel installs. After v1.1.4 the generated WireGuard-hub compose stopped publishing the WebFig proxy port, so the browser couldn't reach it (the proxy itself was fine and targets the device over its transport). The generated compose now publishes the Router Admin port, clearly labelled — and the WebFig proxy is proven end-to-end against a real router. No migration (schema unchanged). See the changelog.
